---
title: "Patrick Kelley"
name: "Patrick Kelley"
image: "/images/profile_pics/patrick_kelley.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Animal behavior and ecological analysis"
location: "**Research location:** various"
dates: "**Dates:** NULL"
category: "Current"
category_order: "1"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
